response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, easily exceeding the 6+ years requirement. He possesses deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and has explicit recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which perfectly aligns with the niche requirements of the role. His exceptional background in testing frameworks, cloud infrastructure, and software craftsmanship makes him an outstanding fit for a Senior Fullstack position, despite missing explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker).
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, including creating testing libraries and teaching TDD and Selenium courses.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest on the resume, though his strong Node.js and testing background easily mitigates this.
Recent backend polyglot experience heavily features Dlang rather than the requested secondary stack (Kotlin/Java), though he does have historical Java experience.
May be overqualified or seeking a higher-level role given his extensive background as a Staff Engineer and Founder.
